skill.name: code-review-security
skill.description: Security-focused review lens for identifying injection risks, auth flaws, secret exposure, unsafe configuration, and missing validation during code review.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-security
description: Security review lens for vulnerabilities, input validation, data protection, auth/authz, and secure defaults.

categories.name: Injection Vulnerabilities
categories.description: SQL, command, XSS, template, and path traversal injection risks

categories.name: Authentication & Authorization
categories.description: Identity checks, session handling, access control, and token safety

categories.name: Data Protection
categories.description: Secrets, PII, encryption, logs, and exposure boundaries

categories.name: Input Validation
categories.description: Whitelisting, bounds checks, sanitization, and schema validation

categories.name: Dependency Security
categories.description: Known vulnerable packages and supply-chain exposure

categories.name: Configuration Security
categories.description: Hardcoded secrets, insecure defaults, debug exposure, and CORS/security headers
